name: Heap
description: Heap is a digital insights platform that automatically captures every user interaction. Track custom events server-side, manage user and account properties, and delete user data for compliance.

capabilities.name: events_track
capabilities.description: Send a custom server-side track event for a specific user.

capabilities.name: events_bulk_track
capabilities.description: Send multiple events in a single batch request (max 1,000).

capabilities.name: users_identify
capabilities.description: Assign a unique identity to a user, merging anonymous sessions.

capabilities.name: users_add_properties
capabilities.description: Set or update custom properties on a user profile.

capabilities.name: users_bulk_add_properties
capabilities.description: Set properties on multiple user profiles in batch (max 1,000).

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete users from the Heap workspace for GDPR compliance.

capabilities.name: accounts_add_properties
capabilities.description: Set properties on an account for B2B analytics grouping.

capabilities.name: accounts_bulk_add_properties
capabilities.description: Set properties on multiple accounts in batch (max 1,000).
